ingredients.name: Sea Boat
ingredients.entityContext: In episode 7, the group rides the Sea Boat water ride at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise, giving Hiyori and Koharu a fun break from fishing activities. It captures the carefree energy of their growing sisterly bond during a day out at the theme park.

ingredients.name: Merry-Go-Round
ingredients.entityContext: The Merry-Go-Round at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise appears in episode 7 as the girls enjoy the amusement park together, a cheerful moment showing Koharu encouraging Hiyori to try new things.

ingredients.name: Aqua Ride II
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒236-0006 Kanagawa, Yokohama, Kanazawa Ward, Hakkeijima, Aqua Ride II, 横浜・八景島シーパラダイス
ingredients.entityContext: The Aqua Ride II water attraction at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise is featured in episode 7 when the group takes a break from fishing for a theme park outing, one of the lighthearted detour scenes that breaks up the fishing-focused narrative.

ingredients.name: UMI FARM
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒236-0006 Kanagawa, Yokohama, Kanazawa Ward, Hakkeijima, UMI FARM, 横浜・八景島シーパラダイス内
ingredients.entityContext: UMI FARM at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise appears in episode 7 as part of the group's day out, where the aquatic petting-zoo atmosphere complements the anime's recurring theme of appreciating nature alongside recreational activities.

ingredients.name: Aqua Museum
ingredients.entityContext: The Aqua Museum at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise is visited in episode 7, offering the characters a glimpse of marine life that echoes the show's love of rivers and water throughout.

ingredients.name: River Spot Hayato Trout Fishery
ingredients.address: River Spot Hayato Trout Fishery, 3627 Toya, Midori Ward, Sagamihara, Kanagawa 252-0155, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: River Spot Hayato (リヴァスポット早戸) in Sagamihara is a documented Slow Loop pilgrimage location appearing in episode 7, where the girls practice fly-fishing in the mountain stream setting that directly inspired the series' fishing sequences.

ingredients.name: Hirogawara Bridge
ingredients.address: Hirogawara Bridge, Ashiyasuashikura, Minami-Alps, Yamanashi 400-0241, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hirogawara Bridge in Minami-Alps, Yamanashi appears in episode 8 as a scenic mountain backdrop during the group's fly-fishing trip, with the clear river below serving as the location for key fishing practice scenes between Hiyori and Koharu.

ingredients.name: Norogawa Hirokawara Information Center
ingredients.localName: 野呂川広河原インフォメーションセンター
ingredients.address: Norogawa Hirogawara Information Center, 字野呂川入-1685 Ashiyasuashikura, Minami-Alps, Yamanashi 400-0241, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Norogawa Hirogawara Information Center near the Hirogawara area in Minami-Alps appears in episode 8 as the staging point before the group heads to the nearby fishing grounds, grounding the mountain fly-fishing excursion in a real trailhead location.

ingredients.name: Nara-irisawa Campground
ingredients.localName: ナラ入沢渓流釣りキャンプ場
ingredients.address: Nara-irisawa Campground, 109-1 Kamimiyori, Nikko, Tochigi 321-2802, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nara-irisawa stream campground in Nikko, Tochigi is a documented Slow Loop location appearing in episode 9, where the girls set up camp by a mountain stream and Hiyori cooks a meal for everyone, combining the show's two core themes of fishing and cooking.

ingredients.name: Tatarahama
ingredients.address: Tatarahama, 4 Chome-１１２０−地先 Kamoi, Yokosuka, Kanagawa 239-0813, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Tatarahama beach in Yokosuka appears in the ending credits sequence, its calm rocky shoreline visually echoing the peaceful coastal atmosphere that frames Hiyori and Koharu's life together near Kannonzaki.

ingredients.name: Berry Park inFUSION Ozenji
ingredients.localName: ベリーパーク in FISH ON! 王禅寺
ingredients.address: Berry Park inFISHON Ozenji, 1227-2 Ozenji, Asao-ku, Kawasaki, Kanagawa 215-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Berry Park in FISH ON! Ozenji in Kawasaki appears in episode 2 as one of the first fishing ponds Koharu visits with Hiyori, marking an early bonding moment where Hiyori begins teaching her new stepsister the basics of fly-fishing.

ingredients.name: Maruimaru Parking Lot
ingredients.entityContext: The Maruimaru parking lot near the Miura Peninsula coast appears in episode 6 as the arrival point before the group's seaside outing, a transitional scene showing the characters gathering their gear.

ingredients.name: Maruimaru
ingredients.address: Kyoto Kawaramachi Garden, 68 Shincho, Shimogyo Ward, Kyoto, 600-8001, Japan

ingredients.name: BASE CAMP
ingredients.entityContext: BASE CAMP in Tokyo appears in episode 6 as a fishing-gear shop the characters visit, reflecting the show's detailed attention to fly-fishing equipment and the culture around tackle stores.

ingredients.name: Hana no Yu
ingredients.localName: 壬生温泉 はなの湯
ingredients.address: Hanano Yu, 15-3 Mibumatsubaracho, Nakagyo Ward, Kyoto, 604-8823, Japan

ingredients.name: Nozoritogekyukeisha Hananoeki Parking Lot
ingredients.localName: 野反峠休憩舎・花の駅駐車場
ingredients.address: MMR4+X2 Nozoritogekyukeisha Hananoeki Parking Lot, Nakanojo, Agatsuma District, Gunma 377-1701, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The parking area at Nozori Pass rest house in Gunma appears in episode 11 as the gateway to Lake Nozori, where the group arrives for their alpine fly-fishing trip and takes in the sweeping highland views.

ingredients.name: Lake Nozori Campground
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒377-1701 Gunma, Agatsuma District, Nakanojo, Iriyama, Lake Nozori Campground, 国有林内
ingredients.entityContext: Lake Nozori Campground in Gunma is a key pilgrimage location for Slow Loop episode 11, where Hiyori and Koharu fish together at the remote alpine lake, representing one of the most visually stunning and emotionally resonant outdoor trips of the series.

ingredients.name: Marunuma Onsen Kankoso
ingredients.address: Marunuma Onsen Kankoso, Higashiogawa, Katashina, Tone District, Gunma 378-0414, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Marunuma Onsen Kankoso in Katashina, Gunma appears in episode 3 as the onsen inn where the group rests after a fishing day near Lake Marunuma, with Koharu experiencing the pleasure of a hot spring bath after outdoor activity for the first time.

ingredients.name: Marunuma Kohan-tei
ingredients.address: Toya Kohantei, 7-8 Toyakoonsen, Toyako, Abuta District, Hokkaido 049-5721, Japan

ingredients.name: Yokosuka Navy Curry Honpo Restaurant
ingredients.localName: 横須賀海軍カレー本舗
ingredients.address: Yokosuka Navy Curry Honpo Restaurant, ＹＹポート横須賀 1 Chome-11-8 Wakamatsucho, Yokosuka, Kanagawa 238-0007, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yokosuka Navy Curry Honpo in Yokosuka appears in episode 4, where Hiyori brings Koharu to try the famous local navy curry after a fishing outing near the coast, tying into the show's recurring theme of Hiyori sharing beloved local foods with her new family.

ingredients.name: Tsuriko
ingredients.entityContext: Tsuriko (つり幸) fishing boat operator in Yokohama appears in episode 5, where the group goes sea fishing for the first time, giving Koharu the experience of open-water fishing in contrast to the river fly-fishing she has been learning.

ingredients.name: Viking
ingredients.entityContext: The Viking swing ride at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise appears in episode 7 as part of the girls' amusement park day, a lively scene contrasting with the show's usual tranquil fishing locations.

ingredients.name: Tsuriko
ingredients.entityContext: Tsuriko (つり幸) fishing boat operator in Yokohama appears in episode 5, where the group goes sea fishing for the first time, giving Koharu the experience of open-water fishing in contrast to the river fly-fishing she has been learning.

ingredients.name: Kannonzaki small jetty
ingredients.localName: 神奈川県立観音崎公園
ingredients.address: Kannonzaki Park, 4 Chome-1262 Kamoi, Yokosuka, Kanagawa 239-0813, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kannonzaki Park's small jetty in Yokosuka is the fishing spot where Hiyori and Koharu go in episode 1, making this the very first location in the anime and the iconic spot where their sisterly bond around fly-fishing begins.

ingredients.name: amaretto Suidobashi
ingredients.localName: 東京メルカート 東京ドームシティ店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒112-8575 Tokyo, Bunkyo City, Koraku, 1 Chome−3−61 東京ドームシティ Tokyo Mercato, ミーツポート3階
ingredients.entityContext: The Italian restaurant at Tokyo Dome City (appearing as amaretto) is visited in episode 2 as a treat after a fishing outing, where Koharu and the group enjoy a meal together and Hiyori shares her enthusiasm for both fishing and good food.

ingredients.name: Gongen Cave
ingredients.address: Gongen Cave, 4 Chome Kamoi, Yokosuka, Kanagawa 239-0813, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Gongen Cave at Kannonzaki in Yokosuka appears in episode 2, where Hiyori shows Koharu the rocky coastal scenery near their home fishing grounds, deepening the sense of the Kannonzaki area as their home territory.

ingredients.name: Kannonzaki Lighthouse
ingredients.address: Kannonzaki Lighthouse, 4 Chome-1187 Kamoi, Yokosuka, Kanagawa 239-0813, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kannonzaki Lighthouse in Yokosuka appears in episode 2 as the recognizable landmark near the fishing spot where Hiyori and Koharu practice together, one of the most iconic and photographed Slow Loop pilgrimage landmarks in the Kannonzaki area.

ingredients.name: Marion Crepes Yokohama Hakkeijima Sea Paradise
ingredients.localName: マリオンクレープ 横浜八景島シーパラダイス店
ingredients.address: 前広場 横浜・八景島シーパラダイスアクアミュージアム, Hakkeijima, Kanazawa Ward, Yokohama, Kanagawa 236-0006, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Marion Crepes stand at Hakkeijima Sea Paradise appears in episode 7, where the girls stop for crepes between attractions, a sweet moment capturing the casual friendship among the group during their theme park day.

ingredients.name: Yokosuka-chuo Station
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒238-0007, 神奈川県横須賀市若松町２丁目２５
ingredients.entityContext: Yokosuka-chuo Station appears in episode 4 as the transit hub the characters pass through on their way to the Yokosuka waterfront, grounding the anime in the real commuter geography of the Miura Peninsula.

ingredients.name: Coast Park
ingredients.entityContext: Coast Park (海岸園地) at Kannonzaki in Yokosuka appears in episode 2, part of the broader Kannonzaki area that forms Hiyori and Koharu's home fishing territory during the early episodes.
